owasp: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
defends: The app wires security-event logging into its auth paths so authentication/authorization events leave an audit trail (OWASP A09).
self_guard: bad fixture has auth files scanned but zero security-logging-sink calls (negative control fires as fail); good fixture calls a recognized sink and passes clean.
note: Fixed evidence manifest — what the app-logging check audits is not model discretion (WORKING_METHOD §1). This verifies the WIRING of security-event logging is PRESENT in auth code (a recognized logging-sink call exists), not the completeness or quality of what is logged — sufficiency of the audit trail is practice, not a mechanical check.
